title: TNT To Firework
description: Tired of TNT grief on your server? This mod intercepts every ignited TNT in the Overworld and swaps it out for a randomly generated firework — complete with random colors, shapes, trails and twinkle effects. Fully server-side, no client install required!
body:
Someone tried to blow up your base? Surprise! 🎆 TNT to Rocket turns every ignited TNT in the Overworld into a random firework instead.

A server-side Fabric mod that hooks into the entity spawn lifecycle to intercept TntEntity in the Overworld dimension and replaces it with a FireworkRocketEntity featuring randomized explosion components (shape, colors, fade, trail, twinkle) and flight duration.
